exam_price_notes: $650 USD per attempt; CMT Association membership required. Offered twice yearly (spring and fall exam windows).
id_requirements: Two forms of ID required: one government-issued photo ID (passport, driver's license) and one secondary ID. Name must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: All three CMT levels are administered at Prometric test centers or via online proctoring. Exams are offered twice per year in spring and fall windows. CMT Association membership is required to register for any level. No notes, study materials, or external calculators are permitted during the exam. The CMT designation is awarded only after passing all three levels, adhering to the Code of Ethics, and maintaining CMT Association membership.
renewal_options: The CMT designation does not expire once all three levels are passed and the designation is awarded. However, annual CMT Association membership dues are required to maintain good standing and use the CMT designation. Continuing education may be encouraged but is not formally required for renewal.

prerequisites.description: Passing CMT Levels I and II; CMT Association membership; adherence to CMT Association Code of Ethics required before designation is awarded.

retake_policy.notes: Candidates may attempt each exam level twice per year (once per exam window). Full exam fee ($650) is required for each attempt. There is no limit on total lifetime attempts.

domains.name: Advanced Chart Analysis and Market Breadth

official_study_resources.title: CMT Curriculum (official required readings per level)
